The '''77 Sectors''' designated the 77 [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]] crossed by the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" /> [[Planet/Legends|Planets]] in the 77 Sectors included [[Allanteen VI/Legends|Allanteen Six]], [[Kailion]] and [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]].<ref name="TEGtW" /><ref name="GatORW" />
